documentation:
For Use at ATL2-DC2 Substation (ATL1-DC1 Ignition)

B: inputRegOffset=9, coilRegOffset=44
C: inputRegOffset=18, coilRegOffset=88
D: inputRegOffset=27, coilRegOffset=132
E: inputRegOffset=36, coilRegOffset=172
F: inputRegOffset=45, coilRegOffset=220
